use_cases: Interactive button element with multiple style variants for form submissions
Action triggers for user interactions with hover and focus states
Versatile button component supporting primary, secondary, outline, ghost, destructive, and link variants
Accessible button with disabled states and keyboard focus indicators
Customizable sizing options for different UI contexts and density requirements
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based Button component with comprehensive variant options including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with CVA for type-safe variant management and supports multiple sizes for flexible UI composition. Features proper accessibility with focus-visible states, disabled states, and keyboard navigation support.
